title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
summary: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
summary: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

title: Humanity Protocol Loses $36M After Private Keys 'Compromised,' Token Crashes 73%
summary: The decentralized identity protocol said a compromised employee's laptop let attackers seize its bridges and mint tokens at will.

title: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
summary: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
summary: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.

title: OpenAI confidentially files to go public in the US
summary: OpenAI says it filed for an initial public offering in the US, but has not yet decided when it will launch.

title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
summary: Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.

title: As OpenAI files for IPO, Sam Altman’s eye-scanning company is doing layoffs, report says
summary: Tools for Humanity, Sam Altman's identity verification company, is reportedly struggling to generate revenue and will downsize its staff.

title: OpenAI Wants to Kill the Chatbot It Invented and Turn It Into a Superapp
summary: The company that launched ChatGPT in 2022 is now betting its future on something closer to WeChat than a Q&A box

title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
summary: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO, following Anthropic
summary: The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, also filed to go public, ramping up the race between the two AI firms.

title: Active tokenized RWAs surge almost 600% despite crypto pullback: Binance
summary: Tokenized stocks, gold and real estate are driving broader adoption as banks and institutions embrace blockchain-based assets despite a weaker crypto market.

title: FCC lets Amazon Leo miss deployment deadline with temporary spectrum penalty
summary:
